params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the HasInventory component class - 'inventory', 'categories', 'max_items'.

inventory.title: List of Items
inventory.description: List of entities that are in the inventory.

categories.title: Item categories
categories.description: Dict of categories that are in the inventory.

max_items.title: Max Items
max_items.description: Maximum number of items the inventory can hold. Default is 10.
max_items.markdownDescription: Maximum number of items the inventory can hold. Default is `10`.
